programme.title: La justicière
programme.desc: Un escroc du passé de Dante a attaqué un transport de prisonniers ; McCall et son équipe vont tout faire pour l'arrêter ; pendant ce temps, le voyage entre filles de tante Vi et Dee est chamboulé par la découverte d'une femme qui squatte leur maison.

programme.title: La justicière
programme.desc: Mel a été enlevée par un membre de son groupe de soutien aux vétérans ! McCall et son équipe se lancent dans une course contre-la-montre pour la sauver ; ailleurs, Dante se voit offrir un poste au sein de l'unité d'enquête spéciale à Los Angeles.

programme.title: Blanca
programme.desc: Le vétérinaire du centre de sauvetage est retrouvé mort ; Liguori et Blanca soupçonnent le stagiaire ; par ailleurs, Domenico et Blanca se rendent à la clinique de néonatologie dans le cadre de leur enquête pour retrouver l'enfant de Valya.

programme.title: HPI: haut potentiel intellectuel
programme.desc: Morgane va tout faire pour démasquer le coupable ; sauf que cette dernière est en congé maternité, et n'a rien à faire sur cette enquête.

programme.title: Chacal
programme.desc: Son précédent client ayant refusé de le payer, la réputation du Chacal est en jeu ; il prépare sa vengeance.

programme.title: Provenances
programme.desc: Boyd s'efforce de trouver un cap à suivre tandis que la ville fait ses adieux à l'un des habitants ; la santé de Fatima se dégrade, et Tabitha trouve de l'aide auprès d'un drôle d'allié.

programme.title: Cat's Eyes
programme.desc: Les Cat's Eyes, mises en échec à Versailles par les trafiquants d'art, organisent un échange de tableaux avec eux autour de la Seine et des bateaux-mouches sans se douter qu'elles sont suivies de près par les trafiquants et la police.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mac fait face à son ennemi le plus redoutable à ce jour ; un tueur a assassiné deux personnes portant le nom de Mac Taylor, faisant de lui une cible ; Mac doit découvrir rapidement les motifs du tueur s'il ne veut pas devenir sa prochaine victime.

programme.title: Le mobile du crime
programme.desc: Un photographe étrange est le principal suspect dans l'assassinat de son assistante ; une enquête est ouverte sur les méthodes d'Angie et chaque membre de l'équipe est interrogé tour à tour.

programme.title: Le mobile du crime
programme.desc: Angie, Brian et Oscar visitent une clinique médicale suite au décès de Dr Lucy Everhill; ils interrogent son collègue, Dr Garrison Osgood.

programme.title: Lien fatal
programme.desc: Immacula Eugène a maltraité plusieurs résidents atteints d'Alzheimer du CHSLD Saint-Lambert-sur-le-Golf, en plus d'administrer des somnifères à certains d'entre eux. C'est un membre de la famille d'une résidente qui a porté plainte.

programme.title: FBI: toute la vérité
programme.desc: Deux bombes sèment la mort et la destruction à l'arrivée du marathon de Boston ; aussitôt, le FBI prend la tête d'une vaste chasse à l'homme pour retrouver les auteurs de l'attentat, qui entraîneront les autorités dans une course-poursuite mortelle.

programme.title: FBI: toute la vérité
programme.desc: Dans les heures suivant les attentats, le sergent MacLellan prend son service de nuit ; à la suite du meurtre d'un policier du MIT, MacLellan se retrouve face à face avec les terroristes ; la fusillade qui s'ensuit donne lieu à une chasse à l'homme.

programme.title: Un amour qui tue
programme.desc: La femme d'un riche médecin est retrouvée morte dans la piscine de leur manoir ; pour résoudre ce meurtre, les enquêteurs plongent dans un monde d'amours sordides où personne n'est ce qu'il semble être dans cette famille en apparence parfaite.

programme.title: Un amour qui tue
programme.desc: Un jeune et ambitieux acteur d'Atlanta est retrouvé poignardé à mort ; les enquêteurs découvrent chez la victime, qui avait une vie sociale et sentimentale bien remplie, de sombres désirs, des rencontres tard le soir et de dangereuses obsessions.

programme.title: Unité des personnes disparues
programme.desc: La MPU doit retrouver le fils d'un médecin; l'enquête prend une tournure imprévue lorsque la mère entre directement en contact avec le ravisseur; pendant ce temps, Kemi fait part à Nikki et Jason de ses inquiétudes concernant le bien-être de Sidney.

programme.title: Unité des personnes disparues
programme.desc: Un employé d'un foyer d'accueil est porté disparu; après la découverte de son corps, la MPU oriente son enquête vers une femme enceinte avec laquelle il a été vu et qui est également portée disparue; ailleurs, Sidney soupçonne Keith d'être dangereux.

programme.title: Unité des personnes disparues
programme.desc: Jason et Mike partent à la recherche d'un couple disparu dans les monts Allegheny ; ils doivent faire vite, car une tempête de neige fonce sur eux ; pendant ce temps, Keith rejoint un groupe de thérapie où il se lie d'amitié avec un autre patient.

programme.title: Code rouge
programme.desc: Malgré la mort d'un passager, le capitaine de l'avion refuse de faire demi-tour ; alors que Nolan craint pour sa vie, la tension monte d'un cran à bord avec la découverte d'un autre corps ; Hana est chargée d'enquêter par Delaney, la cheffe du MI5.

programme.title: HPI: haut potentiel intellectuel
programme.desc: Morgane va tout faire pour démasquer le coupable ; sauf que cette dernière est en congé maternité, et n'a rien à faire sur cette enquête.

programme.title: Aussi dangereux que séduisant
programme.desc: Tombée amoureuse d'un veuf charismatique, une mère célibataire en vient à soupçonner ce dernier d'être un maître de la manipulation.

programme.title: S.O.S.: éruption en plein vol
programme.desc: À Hawaï, d'énormes éruptions volcaniques qui crachent des cendres et des boules de feu empêchent un avion de ligne rempli de passagers d'atterrir.

programme.title: Magnum
programme.desc: Magnum se fait passer pour un médecin sur une application de rencontre ; son objectif : retrouver l'assassin qui cible les hommes riches utilisant cette application.

programme.title: Magnum
programme.desc: Les dobermans déterrent ce qui semble être un os humain ; Magnum et Higgins se joignent alors à l'enquête de Katsumoto sur le meurtre de son ancien mentor.

programme.title: Pompéi
programme.desc: Tandis que le mont Vésuve sort de sa torpeur et plonge peu à peu la cité dans les ténèbres, un gladiateur tâche de sauver la femme qu'il aime avant l'effondrement de la cité.

programme.title: Esprits criminels
programme.desc: L'équipe doit agir rapidement pour retrouver un garçon disparu le jour de l'Halloween à San Diego.

programme.title: Esprits criminels
programme.desc: Dans le Montana, deux hommes sont retrouvés poignardés et abandonnés dans le bois d'une petite ville ; JJ pleure la mort tragique de sa sœur.

programme.title: Les hommes de main
programme.desc: Trois étrangers se retrouvent impliqués dans un conflit qu'aucun d'entre eux n'était préparé à affronter.

programme.title: La voûte
programme.desc: Deux policiers véreux découvrent un coffre étrangement caché et gardé. Son contenu va les entraîner dans un enfer de corruption et de double jeu.

programme.title: FBI: toute la vérité
programme.desc: Deux bombes sèment la mort et la destruction à l'arrivée du marathon de Boston ; aussitôt, le FBI prend la tête d'une vaste chasse à l'homme pour retrouver les auteurs de l'attentat, qui entraîneront les autorités dans une course-poursuite mortelle.

programme.title: Un amour qui tue
programme.desc: La femme d'un riche médecin est retrouvée morte dans la piscine de leur manoir ; pour résoudre ce meurtre, les enquêteurs plongent dans un monde d'amours sordides où personne n'est ce qu'il semble être dans cette famille en apparence parfaite.

programme.title: Un amour qui tue
programme.desc: Un jeune et ambitieux acteur d'Atlanta est retrouvé poignardé à mort ; les enquêteurs découvrent chez la victime, qui avait une vie sociale et sentimentale bien remplie, de sombres désirs, des rencontres tard le soir et de dangereuses obsessions.

programme.title: L'arnaqueuse
programme.desc: Un surfeur mort a échoué sur la plage ; pour résoudre ce meurtre, Max et Ellis acceptent de changer de place ; tandis qu'Ellis infiltre le milieu des surfeurs, Max enfile son chapeau de détective pour démêler un complot criminel digne d'Hitchcock.

programme.title: L'arnaqueuse
programme.desc: Ellis reçoit un coup de fil de son ancienne collègue et ex-petite amie; cette dernière a besoin de son aide pour retrouver un comptable qui doit témoigner contre la mafia; entre-temps, le chef Li prévient Max et Ellis: ils doivent suivre les règles.

programme.title: L'arnaqueuse
programme.desc: Les acteurs d'une populaire série de vampires deviennent la cible d'un harceleur ; Max et Ellis infiltrent le monde du showbiz, où les drames en coulisses sont encore plus fous que ceux à l'écran ; de plus, Max se confie à Ellis au sujet de sa mère.

programme.title: Magnum
programme.desc: Magnum se fait passer pour un médecin sur une application de rencontre ; son objectif : retrouver l'assassin qui cible les hommes riches utilisant cette application.

programme.title: Happy Face
programme.desc: Hazel reçoit une étrange carte d'anniversaire qui oblige finalement sa mère, Melissa, à faire face à la sombre vérité de son passé.

programme.title: Rapides et dangereux 2
programme.desc: Deux coureurs automobiles casse-cous sont recrutés par le FBI pour infiltrer l'entourage d'un dangereux criminel.

programme.title: Blanca
programme.desc: Le vétérinaire du centre de sauvetage est retrouvé mort ; Liguori et Blanca soupçonnent le stagiaire ; par ailleurs, Domenico et Blanca se rendent à la clinique de néonatologie dans le cadre de leur enquête pour retrouver l'enfant de Valya.

programme.title: Géotempête
programme.desc: Le jour où des satellites chargés de contrôler le climat ne fonctionnent plus, un designer doit travailler main dans la main avec son frère pour sauver le monde d'une terrible tempête.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: Un ancien tueur à gages retrouve ses instincts meurtriers après le vol de sa Ford Mustang et le meurtre du chien que lui avait offert sa femme. Il se lance alors à la poursuite du responsable.

programme.title: Le comptable
programme.desc: Génie de mathématiques, Christian Wolff est plus à l'aise avec les chiffres qu'avec les gens. Expert-comptable dans le civil, il travaille en réalité pour plusieurs organisations mafieuses parmi les plus dangereuses au monde.

programme.title: Un meurtrier parmi nous
programme.desc: L'homme d'affaires Gary Triano a perdu des millions et la vie quand sa voiture a explosé après une partie de golf ; il laisse derrière lui une ex-femme en colère et des truands rancuniers.

programme.title: Les enquêtes de Murdoch
programme.desc: Murdoch et Julia se rendent à la prison de Kingston, où un détenu se serait suicidé ; ils découvrent que des gangs rivaux font la loi entre les murs du pénitencier.

programme.title: Les enquêtes de Murdoch
programme.desc: Murdoch, Julia et Brackenreid sont convoqués devant le tribunal ; Terrence Meyers est accusé de tentative d'assassinat sur le premier ministre du Canada, Wilfrid Laurier ; les enquêteurs feront tout pour tirer cette affaire au clair.

programme.title: Les enquêtes de Murdoch
programme.desc: La propriétaire d'un salon de coiffure est retrouvée sans vie ; pour Julia, sa mort n'a rien d'accidentel, mais comme elle est survenue en dehors de la juridiction de Murdoch, Julia devra faire équipe avec Effie et Louise pour élucider l'affaire.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret
programme.desc: When Margaret's parents come for a visit, they ignore her and shower Bob with attention.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret
programme.desc: Bob's siblings attempt to take over their mother's estate and place her in a retirement home.

programme.desc: A man who believes he has put his mysterious past behind him cannot stand idly by when he meets a young girl under the control of ultra-violent Russian gangsters.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Robert McCall's mysterious past cuts especially close to home when thugs kill Susan Plummer, his best friend and former colleague. Now out for revenge, McCall must take on a crew of highly trained assassins who'll stop at nothing to destroy him.

programme.title: Captain America: The First Avenger
programme.desc: After an experimental program turns him into a super soldier, Steve Rogers, now known as Captain America, leads the fight against Red Skull's evil HYDRA organization.

programme.title: Captain America: The Winter Soldier
programme.desc: Captain America (Chris Evans), the Black Widow (Scarlett Johansson) and a new ally, the Falcon, face an unexpected enemy as they struggle to expose a far-reaching conspiracy that puts the world at risk.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An entrepreneur invites scientists (Sam Neill, Laura Dern), a mathematics theorist (Jeff Goldblum) and others to his jungle theme-park featuring dinosaurs regenerated from DNA.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Four years after "Jurassic Park," mathematician Ian Malcolm ventures onto a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Dinosaur expert Dr. Alan Grant and a search party become trapped on an island of prehistoric predators. Can they escape alive with Dr. Alan Grant leading the party?

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: An undercover officer (Arnold Schwarzenegger) teaches a rowdy class of peewees, to identify one whose mother must be found.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The Stooges are mistaken for as professors at Mildew College.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The Stooges are artists living in Paris; when the landlord comes after the overdue rent, the boys skip out and wind up joining the French Foreign Legion.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Four years after "Jurassic Park," mathematician Ian Malcolm ventures onto a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: David Attenborough investigates the mysterious and unique wildlife of the dry southern lands of Madagascar.

programme.title: The Wild Sides
programme.desc: Mashatu is now a thriving Eden; parents focus on teaching and feeding bountiful young.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: U.S. soldiers encounter heavy fire while trying to capture a warlord's associates in Mogadishu, Somalia.

programme.title: G.I. Jane
programme.desc: A female Navy SEALs recruit (Demi Moore) completes rigorous training under a tough officer's (Viggo Mortensen) command.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A pacifist farmer (Mel Gibson) of South Carolina reluctantly joins the Revolutionary War and fights alongside his son (Heath Ledger).

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An FBI agent (Keanu Reeves) turns California surfer to nab bank robbers who wear rubber masks of four ex-presidents.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: For Lieutenant Pete "Maverick" Mitchell and his friend and co-pilot Nick "Goose" Bradshaw, being accepted into an elite training school for fighter pilots is a dream come true. But a tragedy will threaten Pete's dreams of becoming an ace pilot.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The BAU team investigates a wealthy couple's murder at their home following a Super Bowl party; someone places a 911 call quoting Bible passages seconds before the murders.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: A sadistic serial killer kidnaps and tortures Reid and broadcasts the ordeal over the Internet.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: In an upscale New York neighborhood, the team investigates racial motivation as a factor before fallout from killings can escalate.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The team goes to Houston to investigate a series of seemingly random murders at construction sites; the team notices a distinct change in Reid's demeanor.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The team goes to New Orleans to find a perpetrator who has resumed killing after a 15-month break; Reid struggles with the effects of being a hostage.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The team tracks an arsonist through a radical environmental group that uses fire to spread its message.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: Elizabeth Prentiss, a foreign ambassador and SSA Emily Prentiss' mother, seeks the aid of the BAU when a Russian immigrant is kidnapped.

programme.title: Chasing the Rains
programme.desc: In Samburu, matriarch Anastasia turns her elephant herd north after a local river dries up; cheetah mom Kuleta evades a crafty pack of hyenas in Naboisho; checking in on wild dog Phoenix and her new litter in Laikipia.

programme.title: Chasing the Rains
programme.desc: How elephants dig wells; a sudden river-filling downpour; cheetah Kuleta loses one of her cubs to lions; wild dog Phoenix faces off with a hyena mob.

programme.title: Chasing the Rains
programme.desc: Anastasia's herd splits to protect two precious elephant calves; Kuleta retakes territory for her remaining cheetah cubs; Phoenix searches for a new mate; the skies open up and rain begins to heal the parched land.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: A trainer (Kevin Costner) in a Coast Guard program for rescue swimmers turns a cocky recruit (Ashton Kutcher) into his protégé and takes him on a mission to the Bering Strait.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An FBI agent (Keanu Reeves) turns California surfer to nab bank robbers who wear rubber masks of four ex-presidents.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: For Lieutenant Pete "Maverick" Mitchell and his friend and co-pilot Nick "Goose" Bradshaw, being accepted into an elite training school for fighter pilots is a dream come true. But a tragedy will threaten Pete's dreams of becoming an ace pilot.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A Los Angeles sports agent (Tom Cruise) finds love with a pretty accountant (Renee Zellweger) after an attack of conscience costs him his job and fiancée.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Navy lawyers defend two Marines accused of killing a private at the naval station at Guantánamo Bay, Cuba.

programme.title: The Vampire Lestat
programme.desc: Lestat reflects on the events leading to his tour, including the formation of his band and the publication of a certain book, while experiencing a disquieting, drug-fueled spiritual trip and going head-to-head with a resentful coven.

programme.title: The Vampire Lestat
programme.desc: Lestat revisits his origins in Auvergne, explores Toledo with a recent reconnection, and deals with the fallout from Detroit, facing both band tensions and a disgruntled hotel owner.

programme.title: Misery
programme.desc: An author (James Caan) recovers from an accident, nursed by a twisted fan (Kathy Bates) who insists he write a new book just for her.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: A forensic look at how lions hunt much larger prey, like buffalo and elephants, with new perspectives on the way these predators stalk, chase and kill.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats
programme.desc: The Great Barrier Reef exists in nutrient-poor waters, in spite of its immense size.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats
programme.desc: The Red Center of Australia, though home to an inhospitable environment, also has an array of wildlife.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet II
programme.desc: At the top of the planet lies the Arctic Ocean; after four months of winter darkness, the sun returns to reveal a frozen ocean covered in ice; mother polar bears emerge from their hillside dens and lead their cubs down to the sea ice to hunt.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet II
programme.desc: Trekking across the planet's most hostile frozen zone: Antarctica; getting to know ice.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet II
programme.desc: Coming face to face with the scientists bearing witness to history's profound climate shift; pondering the effect these changes have on Earth's human and animal communities, mapping the destruction from space and learning how to save the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet II
programme.desc: Found on every continent, mountains create unique frozen worlds, home to extraordinary animals that must overcome the crushing conditions of the cold.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet II
programme.desc: Going back to the far North of the planet where the largest land habitat on Earth exists, home to great Boreal forests and the barren tundra.

programme.desc: Navy lawyers defend two Marines accused of killing a private at the naval station at Guantánamo Bay, Cuba.

programme.title: Misery
programme.desc: An author (James Caan) recovers from an accident, nursed by a twisted fan (Kathy Bates) who insists he write a new book just for her.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A physicist is linked to a package delivered through the mail that exploded and killed a rival's wife.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Logan (Jerry Orbach, Chris Noth) investigate five homicides in one chaotic day at the 27th Precinct. Guest stars: Alice Drummond, Victor Colicchio.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the death of a famous baseball player's father, who gambled his son's earnings on sporting events.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Racial tensions explode into violence after a middle-aged Jewish man leaves the scene of an accident involving a 12-year-old African-American boy.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A 10-year-old disappears after being taken from her alcoholic mother and placed with an abusive couple.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An investigation reveals a strange plot when a professional tennis player's wrist is broken after she finishes a practice session with a former rival.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Stone contemplates resigning when the mob retaliates against his prosecution of a member of a notorious crime family.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A doctor is charged with murder for prescribing a treatment that caused toxic fumes to emit from a breast-cancer patient's body.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Kincaid and McCoy have to decide whether to risk killing a comatose woman to recover the bullet they need as evidence.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A young actress claiming to have been the victim of a white slavery ring becomes the prime suspect when a wealthy Japanese businessman is murdered.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After the body of a wealthy woman is found in the East River, her daughter and her husband become murder suspects.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A safe-deposit-box company eventually exposes a political activist who went underground 20 years earlier to avoid a murder charge.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe, Logan, McCoy and Kincaid try to clear Van Buren's name after she shoots a pair of young men who accost her at an automated teller machine.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: The ultimate castaways, from saltwater crocodiles and giant eels to crested iguanas, overcome great odds to reach islands thousands of miles apart.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: A fragile paradise in the South Pacific is revealed; international fishing fleets take a serious toll on the region's sharks, albatross and tuna.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: A closer look into the blue will reveal a scattering of islands, from the Tropics to the sub-Antarctic waters of the Southern Ocean.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: The violent eruption of underwater volcanoes produce coral reefs that support large groups of gray reef sharks and giant manta rays; strange creatures including the vampire bug and megapode -- a bird that uses volcanic springs to incubate its eggs.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: A large part of the remote, blue wilderness of the South Pacific is a marine desert, in which many animals go to extraordinary lengths to survive.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: With flightless parrots, burrowing bats, giant skinks and kangaroos in trees, wildlife has evolved in extraordinary ways on the isolated islands of the South Pacific.

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: The hostile conditions of Earth's desert regions give rise to the most incredible survival stories on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Cities serve as places of surprising opportunity for animals to thrive.

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: The secretive lives of mountain animals; snow leopards come together to help a mother and cub, trapped between rival males.

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Grasslands cover one quarter of all land and support the greatest gatherings of wildlife on Earth, but hostile seasons pose a survival risk.

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: From the jungles of Brazil to Costa Rica, animals face life in the most competitive place on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Remote islands offer sanctuary; pygmy three-toed sloth resides on a Caribbean island; nesting albatross thrive in isolation.

programme.title: Mayday

programme.title: Un souper presque parfait
programme.desc: Mercredi, Félix cuisine en chantant ; au cocktail, on tente de nouer la tige d'une cerise avec la langue ; les invités sont perplexes de ne trouver qu'une seule crevette dans leur assiette d'entrée.

programme.desc: Gabriel a une énorme excroissance sur la clavicule, mais il est terrifié à l'idée d'une intervention chirurgicale.

programme.title: Vendre ou rénover au Québec

programme.title: Vendre ou rénover au Québec

programme.title: Dre Boutons

programme.desc: Lorsque Rory arrive dans un gîte touristique pour le renouvellement des vœux de ses parents, elle tombe sur l'ex qui lui a brisé le cœur; paniquée, elle affirme que le propriétaire du gîte touristique est son nouvel amoureux.

programme.title: Sauvetage réno

programme.title: Un souper presque parfait

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Lacey plans a parade for Dog River Days with all the fixings; Wanda uses a mascot to convince a corporate sponsor to support the cause; Hank battles Emma for the beauty pageant crown.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Brent accidentally locks Hank and Wanda in Corner Gas; Emma tries to get out of making Davis's special bread.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash finds himself at odds with his direct supervisor while they treat a couple of skydivers with a unique relationship; Mags speaks out against her supervising doctor; a mistake comes back to bite Theo.

programme.title: This Time Each Year
programme.desc: Despite a trial separation, Lauren pretends to still be with her husband, Kevin, to placate her overbearing mother. The ruse may be just what the couple needs to finally work on their marriage.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: On the eve of World War II, Sigmund Freud and C.S. Lewis gather to discuss the existence of God and the future of mankind.

programme.title: We Grown Now
programme.desc: In 1992 best friends Malik and Eric traverse the city of Chicago, looking to escape the mundaneness of school and the hardships of growing up in public housing. They soon find their unbreakable bond challenged when a tragedy shakes their community.

programme.title: An Autumn Romance
programme.desc: A woman tries to save a small, historic hotel from developers, but she soon realizes that the man she's falling for is behind the hotel's development plans.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots take on their biggest challenge yet. When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, they must team up with a powerful faction of Transformers known as the Maximals to save Earth.

programme.title: Borderlands
programme.desc: Returning to her home planet Pandora, an infamous bounty hunter forms an unexpected alliance with a ragtag team of misfits. Together, they battle alien monsters and dangerous bandits to uncover one of Pandora's most explosive secrets.

programme.title: Voyagers
programme.desc: With the future of the human race at stake, a group of young men and women embark on an expedition to colonize a distant planet. As life on the ship descends into chaos, they soon become consumed by fear, lust and an insatiable hunger for power.

programme.title: Hockey Fanatics
programme.desc: Join celebrity host Dave Foley and guest star Jason Priestley as they explore the passion, culture, and excitement of Canucks hockey, fans and the city of Vancouver.

programme.title: Hockey Fanatics
programme.desc: Dave Foley and guest star Scott Wolf find the Mammoth hockey fandom and eats in Salt Lake City.

programme.title: Hockey Fanatics
programme.desc: Dave Foley and guest star Jay Baruchel skate into Montreal to find the Canadiens hockey fandom and eat in La Métropole.

programme.title: The Tom Green Farm
programme.desc: Tom's niece, Logan, visits him at the farm while he goes about on his daily life and routine with his animals.

programme.title: Meadowlarks
programme.desc: Four siblings, torn apart by the Sixties Scoop, reunite for one week.

programme.title: Renfield
programme.desc: Renfield, the tortured aide to his narcissistic boss, Dracula, is forced to procure his master's prey and do his every bidding. However, after centuries of servitude, he's ready to see if there's a life outside the shadow of the Prince of Darkness.

programme.title: The Iron Claw
programme.desc: The true story of the Von Erich brothers, who, through tragedy and triumph, under the shadow of their domineering father and coach, seek epic immortality on the biggest stage in sports.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: A man moves into a new home that has supernatural forces lurking in the shadows. As dark entities start to threaten him, his brave dog comes to the rescue.

programme.title: Solemates
programme.desc: A love triangle between a shoe store owner, a customer and an old pair of shoes. When Andrew walks into William's store to replace his own worn old pair of brogues, interest is piqued.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Davis tries to get Brent to join his rugby team; Brent's more focused on inventing a new rugby chant; Hank and Karen convince Lacey to start selling pizza in the Ruby.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: The band Thunderface reunites; a song Brent wrote back in high school has Lacey investigating his mystery crush; Oscar shoots a fundraising video for the Seniors' Center.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Recovering from a personal crisis, Mags worries about how to get her life back on track; Bash takes an unorthodox approach to treating a soldier with PTSD; Theo treats a terminally ill child whose father is desperate for a drug trial.

programme.title: Mistletoe Time Machine
programme.desc: Three ex-best friends are forced back together when a magical incident sends them back to a pivotal moment in their shared past.

programme.title: 200% Wolf
programme.desc: Freddy Lupin's wayward wish transforms him into a werewolf and brings a mischievous moon spirit to Earth. With help from his friends and a legendary villain, he must restore cosmic order before the Earth and moon collide.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem
programme.desc: The Turtle brothers take on a mysterious crime syndicate, but they soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.

programme.title: Eleanor the Great
programme.desc: After the death of her oldest friend, 94-year-old Eleanor Morgenstein moves from Florida to New York City for a fresh start. Wandering into a support group for Holocaust survivors, she tells a tale that takes on a dangerous life of its own.

programme.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
programme.desc: A golden retriever with a flair for sports helps a boy (Kevin Zegers) handle football and the new boyfriend (Gregory Harrison) of the boy's widowed mother (Cynthia Stevenson).

programme.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
programme.desc: A golden retriever with a flair for sports helps a boy (Kevin Zegers) handle football and the new boyfriend (Gregory Harrison) of the boy's widowed mother (Cynthia Stevenson).

programme.title: Air Bud: World Pup
programme.desc: The golden retriever helps his young owner (Kevin Zegers) and his coed soccer team to shine while outsmarting a wily dogcatcher.

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
programme.desc: A husband and wife are unaware that each is an international assassin who has just been assigned to kill the other.

programme.title: On the Roam
programme.desc: Jason Momoa travels across the country to meet the extraordinary individuals blazing their own path.

programme.title: Ferrari
programme.desc: During the summer of 1957, bankruptcy looms over the company that Enzo Ferrari and his wife built 10 years earlier. He decides to roll the dice and wager it all on the iconic Mille Miglia, a treacherous 1,000-mile race across Italy.

programme.title: Hair of the Bear
programme.desc: Suffering from debilitating anxiety and refusing to go to school, 16-year-old Tori is driven to stay with her grandfather in a remote frozen wilderness but unexpectedly finds herself caught up in a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Never Let Go
programme.desc: When an unspeakable evil takes over the world, the only protection for a mother and her twin sons is their house and strong bond. Needing to stay connected at all times, they tether themselves with ropes, clinging to one another and never letting go.

programme.title: Fast X
programme.desc: Dom Toretto and his family must confront the most lethal opponent they've ever faced. Fueled by revenge, a terrifying threat emerges from the shadows of the past to shatter Dom's world and destroy everything -- and everyone -- he loves.

programme.title: The Wish Swap
programme.desc: When Casey and Henry find themselves celebrating their birthdays at the same restaurant, they make birthday wishes at the same time which are granted. However, they end up getting each other's wishes.

programme.title: Air Bud: Seventh Inning Fetch
programme.desc: The golden retriever joins a middle-school baseball team and searches for his missing offspring.

programme.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
programme.desc: A dog that plays volleyball helps investigators solve a rash of mysterious crimes.

programme.title: Flow
programme.desc: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

programme.title: Amish Affair
programme.desc: Hannah knows her secret relationship with Aaron, a charismatic Amish leader, has them both living in sin, so she decides to end it. However, when Aaron's wife suspiciously dies, she finds herself framed for murder and fighting to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Night of the Zoopocalypse
programme.desc: When a meteor unleashes a virus that turns zoo animals into zombies, a mountain lion and a wolf lead a team of survivors to save the day.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of talking rats. However, when Maurice and the rodents reach the town of Bad Blintz, their little con soon goes down the drain.

programme.title: White Bird: A Wonder Story
programme.desc: A girl in Nazi-occupied France goes into hiding with help from a schoolmate -- a boy who risks everything to give her the chance to survive. Together, they find first love in a stunning, magical world of their own creation.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Youngblood
programme.desc: Follows Dean Youngblood, a hockey prodigy who joins the Hamilton Bulldogs and has to deal with toxic behavior during his journey to the National Hockey League draft.

programme.title: Nickel Boys
programme.desc: Elwood Curtis' college dreams are shattered when he's sentenced to a brutal reformatory in the Jim Crow South. Clinging to his optimistic worldview, Elwood strikes up a friendship with a fellow Black teen who dispenses fundamental tips for survival.

programme.title: Daddio
programme.desc: A woman gets into a taxi at New York airport and gradually tells the driver about her unfortunate decisions that led to an affair with a married man; the driver also reveals more and more about his life.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: A.rtificial I.mmortality
programme.desc: Exploring the latest thinking and technological advancements in AI.

programme.title: A '90s Christmas
programme.desc: A workaholic lawyer destined to spend Christmas alone is transported back to 1999 after an unexpected run in with a particularly wise ride-share driver.

programme.title: Little jesus
programme.desc: Tells the story of Jean who pins his hopes of recovering from his wounds on a miracle: his ten-year-old son. He is convinced that Loulou is the new Messiah.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon - Homecoming
programme.desc: Hiccup and Toothless reunite to remind both their kinds of the inseparable bond between Vikings and dragons.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Movie
programme.desc: When their biggest rival, Humdinger, starts wreaking havoc as the mayor of Adventure City, Ryder and everyone's favorite heroic pups kick into high gear to face the challenge.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Mighty Movie
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol pups magically gain superpowers after a meteor strikes Adventure City. However, things take a turn for the worse when Humdinger and a mad scientist steal their powers and turn themselves into supervillains.

programme.title: Paws in the City
programme.desc: A woman lands a job caring for a dachshund diva whose bark is worse than her bite, much like the dog's reclusive and handsome owner. What starts as a way to keep a roof over her head soon turns into an opportunity for lifelong success and love.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

programme.title: Borderlands
programme.desc: Returning to her home planet Pandora, an infamous bounty hunter forms an unexpected alliance with a ragtag team of misfits. Together, they battle alien monsters and dangerous bandits to uncover one of Pandora's most explosive secrets.

programme.title: IF
programme.desc: After discovering she can see everyone's imaginary friends, a girl embarks on a magical adventure to reconnect forgotten IFs with their kids.

programme.title: GOAT
programme.desc: A small goat named Will gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball -- a high-intensity, full-contact sport that's dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.

programme.title: Fairyland
programme.desc: A father-daughter relationship evolves through an era of Bohemian decadence in the 1970s San Francisco to the sober and heartbreaking era of the AIDS crisis in the 1980s.

programme.title: The Travellers
programme.desc: A successful stage designer returns to his small hometown to say goodbye to his dying mother, but the quick trip descends into chaos as he navigates family responsibilities, his father, old friends and past lovers.

programme.title: They Will Kill You
programme.desc: A woman answers a cryptic ad for a housekeeping job at a luxurious yet foreboding New York City high-rise. Upon arrival, she discovers residents have vanished without a trace for decades, fueling whispers of a satanic cult lurking in the shadows.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

programme.title: Self Reliance
programme.desc: A man receives an offer to win $1 million by playing a game where he must outwit hunters who are trying to kill him. He soon realizes they can only attack him when he's alone, but none of his friends or family believe the game is real.

programme.title: An Autumn Romance
programme.desc: A woman tries to save a small, historic hotel from developers, but she soon realizes that the man she's falling for is behind the hotel's development plans.

programme.title: Ailey

programme.desc: Dom Toretto and his family must confront the most lethal opponent they've ever faced. Fueled by revenge, a terrifying threat emerges from the shadows of the past to shatter Dom's world and destroy everything -- and everyone -- he loves.

programme.title: The Wish Swap
programme.desc: When Casey and Henry find themselves celebrating their birthdays at the same restaurant, they make birthday wishes at the same time which are granted. However, they end up getting each other's wishes.

programme.title: Air Bud: Seventh Inning Fetch
programme.desc: The golden retriever joins a middle-school baseball team and searches for his missing offspring.

programme.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
programme.desc: A dog that plays volleyball helps investigators solve a rash of mysterious crimes.

programme.title: Flow
programme.desc: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

programme.title: Amish Affair
programme.desc: Hannah knows her secret relationship with Aaron, a charismatic Amish leader, has them both living in sin, so she decides to end it. However, when Aaron's wife suspiciously dies, she finds herself framed for murder and fighting to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Night of the Zoopocalypse
programme.desc: When a meteor unleashes a virus that turns zoo animals into zombies, a mountain lion and a wolf lead a team of survivors to save the day.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of talking rats. However, when Maurice and the rodents reach the town of Bad Blintz, their little con soon goes down the drain.

programme.title: White Bird: A Wonder Story
programme.desc: A girl in Nazi-occupied France goes into hiding with help from a schoolmate -- a boy who risks everything to give her the chance to survive. Together, they find first love in a stunning, magical world of their own creation.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Youngblood
programme.desc: Follows Dean Youngblood, a hockey prodigy who joins the Hamilton Bulldogs and has to deal with toxic behavior during his journey to the National Hockey League draft.

programme.title: Nickel Boys
programme.desc: Elwood Curtis' college dreams are shattered when he's sentenced to a brutal reformatory in the Jim Crow South. Clinging to his optimistic worldview, Elwood strikes up a friendship with a fellow Black teen who dispenses fundamental tips for survival.

programme.title: Daddio
programme.desc: A woman gets into a taxi at New York airport and gradually tells the driver about her unfortunate decisions that led to an affair with a married man; the driver also reveals more and more about his life.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: A.rtificial I.mmortality
programme.desc: Exploring the latest thinking and technological advancements in AI.

programme.title: A '90s Christmas
programme.desc: A workaholic lawyer destined to spend Christmas alone is transported back to 1999 after an unexpected run in with a particularly wise ride-share driver.

programme.title: Little jesus
programme.desc: Tells the story of Jean who pins his hopes of recovering from his wounds on a miracle: his ten-year-old son. He is convinced that Loulou is the new Messiah.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon - Homecoming
programme.desc: Hiccup and Toothless reunite to remind both their kinds of the inseparable bond between Vikings and dragons.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Movie
programme.desc: When their biggest rival, Humdinger, starts wreaking havoc as the mayor of Adventure City, Ryder and everyone's favorite heroic pups kick into high gear to face the challenge.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Mighty Movie
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol pups magically gain superpowers after a meteor strikes Adventure City. However, things take a turn for the worse when Humdinger and a mad scientist steal their powers and turn themselves into supervillains.

programme.title: Paws in the City
programme.desc: A woman lands a job caring for a dachshund diva whose bark is worse than her bite, much like the dog's reclusive and handsome owner. What starts as a way to keep a roof over her head soon turns into an opportunity for lifelong success and love.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

programme.title: Borderlands
programme.desc: Returning to her home planet Pandora, an infamous bounty hunter forms an unexpected alliance with a ragtag team of misfits. Together, they battle alien monsters and dangerous bandits to uncover one of Pandora's most explosive secrets.

programme.title: IF
programme.desc: After discovering she can see everyone's imaginary friends, a girl embarks on a magical adventure to reconnect forgotten IFs with their kids.

programme.title: GOAT
programme.desc: A small goat named Will gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball -- a high-intensity, full-contact sport that's dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.

programme.title: Fairyland
programme.desc: A father-daughter relationship evolves through an era of Bohemian decadence in the 1970s San Francisco to the sober and heartbreaking era of the AIDS crisis in the 1980s.

programme.title: The Travellers
programme.desc: A successful stage designer returns to his small hometown to say goodbye to his dying mother, but the quick trip descends into chaos as he navigates family responsibilities, his father, old friends and past lovers.

programme.title: They Will Kill You
programme.desc: A woman answers a cryptic ad for a housekeeping job at a luxurious yet foreboding New York City high-rise. Upon arrival, she discovers residents have vanished without a trace for decades, fueling whispers of a satanic cult lurking in the shadows.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

The members of the 118 rush to the site of a hit-and-run that leaves a familiar face in critical condition; with Buck's help, Athena investigates the case of a missing woman; Josh recalls an emergency in 2006 that led him to become a first responder.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: FIFA Soccer. Netherlands faces Sweden in a Group F match of the FIFA World Cup at Houston Stadium. Netherlands holds a point lead after a 2-2 tie with Japan. Sweden leads the group behind Yasin Ayari and his two goals from a 5-1 Group F opening match victory.

programme.title: TSN at the World Cup

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: FIFA Soccer. Germany faces Côte d'Ivoire in a Group E match of the FIFA World Cup at Toronto Stadium. Germany comes off a 7-1 win over Curaçao where Kai Havertz scored twice, while Côte d'Ivoire enters after a 1-0 win behind a 90th-minute Amad Diallo goal.

programme.title: TSN at the World Cup
programme.desc: TSN coverage of the 2026 FIFA Men's World Cup from Canada, United States and Mexico.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: FIFA Soccer. Ecuador faces Curaçao in a Group E match of the FIFA World Cup at Kansas City Stadium. Moises Caicedo and Ecuador aim to rebound from a 1-0 loss to Côte d'Ivoire, while Curaçao looks to recover from a 7-1 defeat where Livano Comenencia scored.

programme.title: World Cup Tonight
programme.desc: News, highlights and commentary from the 2026 FIFA Men's World Cup in Canada, United States and Mexico.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: A crazy burger creation coming from Phoenix and handmade sausages out of Portland, Ore.; a couple California spots are sending spicy Mexican shrimp and the bomb barbecue.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri are making recipes sent by "DDD" alums who join them via video chat; on this menu, there's real deal barbecue from Los Angeles, wild Thai dishes out of Phoenix and a monster lasagna from Minneapolis.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and Hunter are joined by "DDD" alums via video chat to cook up a menu of chicken and biscuits out of Brooklyn and off-the-hook Jamaican oxtail and wings from Cincinnati; a whole new kind of crab cake comes straight out of Baltimore.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is tasting everything from pasta to pescatarian grub; Vanilla Ice takes Guy to an Ecuadorian joint in Miami for standout ceviche; in Minnesota, a former DJ mixes it up with his take on scratch-made pasta and poutine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri makes "Triple-D" style takeout with "DDD" alums who join Guy and Hunter via video chat; there's killer Cajun coming from Los Angeles, sweet and savory crepes out of Las Vegas and empanadas sent from Denver.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Four DDD alums send ingredients to Guy and Hunter for their most off-the-hook recipes; on this menu, there's Roman-style pizza from Arizona, a wicked-hot burger from Boston, Hawaiian surf and turf, and Trinidadian specialties out of Seattle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Italian fare from Scottsdale, Ariz.; American-Indian fare from Denver; gourmet grub out of a Massachusetts lounge; short ribs from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hitting Triple-D's 50th state as he heads into Sioux Falls, S.D.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Four DDD alums send Guy and Hunter ingredients for their most off-the-hook recipes; gourmet grilled cheese from Nashville; primo pizza from Boulder, Colo.; Memphis fried chicken and Greek kebabs out of Houston.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing sandwiches, spice and everything nice, starting with lights-out lamb in Fargo, N.D.; a spot in Sioux Falls, S.D., is loading up hand-held flavor bombs and in Fairbanks, Alaska, a wild pizza place is making spicy, sweet pies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy is setting his sights on seafood and creative comfort; Stephanie Izard's Chicago joint puts out elevated diner fare like Szechuan biscuit sandwiches; in Florida, Guy finds gangster gumbo, off-the-hook étouffée and a righteous Reuben.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's loading up on tots, turkey and tons in between; in Tennessee, a Memphis BBQ joint is plating over-the-top turkey legs; in New York, a Polish spot is dishing out blueberry pierogies; an Irish pub is serving top-notch tots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into cheffed-up eats of all kinds; a "Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives" alum is sourcing local Decatur, Ga., ingredients for coffee-dusted venison; a joint in Texas is topping its bagels with basil schmears.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri returns to some of his favorite diners, drive-ins and dives. Whether they've opened new locations, expanded their old ones or added to their menus, these DDD veterans are always pushing the boundaries of their culinary comfort zones.

programme.title: Andy's East Coast Kitchen Crawl
programme.desc: Andy stops in P.E.I.'s capital for BBQ bologna, iconic ice cream and a famed lobster roll.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Fieri's kicking it Cajun, Asian, and more, starting at a Los Gatos, CA, eatery with their gangster gumbo. Then, a sushi spot in Riviera Beach, FL, is plating the-bomb basil shrimp, and a joint in Sacramento, CA, is firing up big-deal brisket ramen.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: The hosts make a summery steakhouse menu to celebrate Father's Day, including Chicago steakhouse peppercorn-crusted filet, crab au poivre, and barbecue bacon wedge salad with grilled corn; the hosts share their favorite summer wines.

programme.title: Ready Jet Cook
programme.desc: Chef Jet recreates two Chinese takeout favorites at home: Yang Chow Fried Rice and Kung Pao Chicken. From market shopping to wok skills and velveting techniques, Jet shows how easy it is to turn these classic, craveable dishes into weeknight staples.

programme.title: Ready Jet Cook
programme.desc: Chef Jet dives into Thai cuisine with Thai Cashew Chicken and a bright, citrusy Tom Yum Soup. Along the way, he breaks down the Thai flavor balance, key market ingredients, and the cultural influences that shape these bold, comforting specialties.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: The kitchen is bringing back old-school favorites with tasty updates, including beef stroganoff with egg noodles, chicken Kiev with peas and carrots and stuffed cabbage rolls; the hosts chat about the new season of "Alex vs America!"

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli welcomes guest Kelsey Nixon to join her for a spring menu of baked vegetable spring rolls with sweet and spicy dipping sauce, grilled boneless chicken thighs with scallion ginger sauce and lemon blueberry snacking cake.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is paying homage to her mother's Irish roots by making healthier stuffed cabbage, an Irish pub salad and Irish soda bread with cheddar and chives; for dessert, Valerie makes sticky toffee pudding.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is celebrating a new book by making some of the recipes for two dear friends; she cooks sausage and peppers, a tuna egg salad melt and a delightful butter lettuce salad with zesty green goddess dressing.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli makes an elegant, fancy breakfast for dinner; the menu includes soft scrambled eggs, roasted garlic mushrooms and bacon jam with toast; Valerie makes a colorful strawberry arugula salad and a bloody maria cocktail.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli invites her friends Jet Tila and his wife, Ali, for an evening around the fire pit; she makes pimento cheese dip, veggie chili, and creamed corn skillet cornbread.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli makes a lunch with a few twists for friends; the menu includes grilled lamb pita sandwiches with Mediterranean salsa and Mediterranean grilled veggie orzo salad; dessert features the classic combo of peanut butter and jelly.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is updating her favorite dishes from restaurants around Los Angeles; the menu includes clams casino, focaccia pizza, a Beverly Hills chopped salad and a top-shelf Cadillac margarita.

programme.desc: The restoration of crumbling ancient villages and hamlets in France, Spain, Italy and Portugal.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: With over $1 million for their dream house, a couple move from Seattle to Spain's Garraf Coast; their search is divided as one wants to live in the center of a bustling beach town, while the other yearns for quiet, inland privacy.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Two Texan twins search for a place as they embark for grad school in Manchester, England; they're teaming up with an unknown roommate to afford the high rent, but with contrasting priorities, the hunt is sure to be an educational experience.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Washington mother urges her husband to take a work assignment so their children can grow abroad in Yokosuka, Japan; they're hoping to provide their kids with an enriching experience, but finding a place for a family of five may be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An impulsive Canadian couple is moving with their 16-year-old daughter to the calmer vibes of Costa Rica; they're searching for a place just big enough to house them and their visiting family, but it may be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: First-time parents are leaving Colombia to start fresh with their new baby in Melbourne, Australia; the in-laws are coming along too, so they're looking for a spacious home that can accommodate their extended family of five.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A military family makes a company move to Gloucestershire, England; after several domestic moves and a long solo deployment for dad, they're looking for a place where they can spend more time together as a family.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Boston newlyweds with European roots look to trade the big city for Stirling, Scotland; with new-found citizenship and the ability to work remotely, they're returning to his parents' homeland to explore his family heritage and historic charm.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Empty-nesters are ready to take the plunge and relocate to Mexico; they're both looking forward to all the activities this area offers, but he wants to slow down and downsize, while she's looking for extra space for her stuff, and her visiting son.

programme.desc: Nux trouve un sérum bien particulier pour lui permettre d'obtenir de l'information sur Cassiopée et sa fille, mais Baz vient chambouler ses plans ; Vic maîtrise pour la première fois son pouvoir de vision et aide Aïsha à déjouer Nux.

programme.title: Bernard Sports
programme.desc: Bernard essaie la marche à pied à nouveau.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: C'est une nouvelle année sur Piggy Island, et la lutte entre les oiseaux et les cochons fait toujours rage ; les oiseaux réussiront peut-être à contrecarrer les multiples tentatives des cochons pour attraper leurs précieux œufs.

programme.title: Ranger Rob
programme.desc: Rob, Pile-Poil et Bubulle rouvrent le Restaurant-Citadelle ; Pile-Poil et Bubulle vont devoir apprendre à ne pas donner de la nourriture faite pour les humains aux animaux.

programme.title: Agent Binky: protecteur de l'univers
programme.desc: Les Protecteurs ressentent de la fatigue et s'endorment dans la station spatiale. Freddy et Amelia doivent faire équipe pour mettre fin aux absurdités nocturnes de la professeure Coucou.

programme.title: Jungle en délire
programme.desc: Phacochère est fier de ses cheveux, mais il a une mèche rebelle.

programme.title: T'es où Chicky?
programme.desc: Chicky trouve un petit pot avec des cure-dents ; il en prend un et joue à l'escrime !

programme.title: Mille Bornes Challenge
programme.desc: Mis au défi par les Tornades, Loops parie l'enceinte que le Club des Flèches leur a offerte ; paniqué à l'idée de la perdre, Loops se met tellement la pression qu'il en perd ses moyens et multiplie les risques de défaite pour son équipe.

programme.title: Chop Chop Ninja Challenge
programme.desc: Neeko doit mettre un singe dans un tonneau.

programme.title: Wowanimo
programme.desc: On présente l'unique et surprenant singe capucin.

programme.title: Les Pyjamasques
programme.desc: Yoyo veut augmenter sa vitesse, mais en faisant cela, il diminue les pouvoirs de Gluglu et de Bibou.

programme.title: Garfield tout court
programme.desc: De courtes animations avec Garfield et toute sa bande.

programme.title: Les lance-pierres d'Angry Birds
programme.desc: Deux petits cochons astucieux utilisent le pouvoir de la technologie pour s'affranchir des contraintes du chantier.

programme.title: Les sisters
programme.desc: Alerte rouge : Marine se retrouve avec le même bouton que Wendy sur la figure et se demande si elle n'est pas en train de devenir une ado naissante.

programme.title: Les cochons d'Angry Birds
programme.desc: Suivant la vie de tous les jours et les problèmes de cochons espiègles.

programme.title: Mike, une vie de chien!
programme.desc: Mike se trouve dans une situation difficile quand Fluffy prend un collier dans la cour d'Iris ; Iris pense que l'objet est pour elle.

programme.title: Mike, une vie de chien!
programme.desc: Alors que Mike est distrait en flirtant avec Iris, les ratons laveurs se faufilent dans la maison et font des dégâts dans la cuisine.

programme.title: Alix et les Merveilleux
programme.desc: Alix brise accidentellement la télécommande qui permet de contrôler la météo au Pays des Merveilleux ; tandis que Lapin tente de réparer la météo-zappette, Alix veut se racheter en faisant passer à sa bande une belle journée malgré le mauvais temps.

programme.title: Grands mots, petites histoires
programme.desc: Christophe et Scapin ne comprennent pas pourquoi les jumelles sont si irritables ; ils essaient de les éviter, puis d'être gentils avec elles, mais rien n'y fait ; jusqu'à ce qu'ils trouvent les barrettes perdues des jumelles.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: Mazu construit un drone qui peut voler partout; jalouse, Hegan lance une compétition; avec les amis de Mazu sur son dos, elle est trop sûre d'elle et les perd près du mont de l'Oubli; Mazu et Hegan doivent travailler ensemble pour sauver leurs amis.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: Mazu veut être le premier à trouver une météorite qui a atterri dans le désert.

programme.title: Végétosaures
programme.desc: Ginger libère des bébés Cocodons enfermés dans un parc de bambous, mais comprend très vite son erreur ; Ginger et les petits Pois-Rex vont devoir trouver une idée pour les ramener.

programme.title: Léon
programme.desc: Les choses s'enveniment rapidement lorsque Léon est un peu trop endormi le matin et qu'il se retrouve à faire partie de son propre petit-déjeuner.

programme.title: Antoinette dans les Cévennes
programme.desc: Antoinette attend l'été et la promesse d'une semaine en amoureux avec son amant, Vladimir, mais, au dernier moment, il annule : sa femme a réservé une randonnée en famille dans les Cévennes avec un âne.

programme.title: La cuisine d'Isabelle et Ricardo
programme.desc: La cheffe Isabelle Deschamps Plante poursuit la mission de Ricardo ; elle reçoit dans la même cuisine pour y préparer des recettes simples, réconfortantes et accessibles, trois jours par semaine.

programme.title: 5 chefs dans ma cuisine
programme.desc: Caroline Dumas nous propose un riz bijou ; c'est un riz au jasmin cuisiné avec des jaunes d'œuf, du yogourt nature et du safran ; le tout est délicieusement garni de pistaches, d'amandes effilées, d'eau de rose et d'épices.

programme.title: Le téléjournal midi

programme.title: Le grand départ
programme.desc: Un chirurgien plastique de renommée se sépare de sa femme. Sa vie est chamboulée lorsque toute sa famille le blâme des problèmes présents dans son couple.

programme.title: Meurtres au paradis
programme.desc: L'équipe enquête sur un mystérieux cas d'empoisonnement, survenu en pleine représentation du classique de Shakespeare : La tempête. Mervin doit prendre une décision difficile qui concerne son frère.

programme.desc: Jean Dumas commence à réaliser qu'il a affaire à de redoutables ennemis ; Anthony veut venir en aide à sa belle-mère, Stéphanie ; Sophie demande conseil à Jean pour tenter d'y voir clair dans le dossier de Thomas Langevin.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet, détective privée

programme.title: Bernard Sports
programme.desc: Bernard, le plus malchanceux et maladroit des ours blancs, se met au sport et accumule les catastrophes. Ses amis n'ont qu'une obsession : faire mieux que lui.

programme.title: Agent Binky: protecteur de l'univers

programme.title: Jungle en délire

programme.title: T'es où Chicky?

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons

programme.title: Les lance-pierres d'Angry Birds

programme.title: Mike, une vie de chien!

programme.title: Alix et les Merveilleux

programme.title: Grands mots, petites histoires

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: Lorsque Mazu aide Rocky à gagner une partie de cache-cache, Rocky se proclame le plus grand chercheur de dinosaures de tous les temps sans accorder aucun crédit à Mazu, qui a fait tout le travail ; Flic, Flac et Floc disparaissent du lac.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus

programme.title: Les ani-monstres

programme.title: Bernard

programme.desc: Marine apprend que sa sœur est passée en mode limace ; c'est un truc normal d'adolescents d'être tout le temps fatigué ; par conséquent, si elle veut aller à l'accrobranche, Marine doit réveiller sa sœur.

programme.title: Grands mots, petites histoires

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
